S03.meta: // SLIDE 03 — WHAT A LEARNING OUTCOME ACTUAL

data.title: WHAT A LEARNING OUTCOME ACTUALLY IS.
blocks: · A specific performance verb that describes observable thinking or action
· The content or concept the performance is applied to
· The level of specificity that tells you what successful performance looks like

data.title: COMMON MISTAKES
blocks: Writing outcomes that are actually topics.
Using Bloom's verbs without specificity.

Importing the prior lesson's outcome.
